'''dhapïfvïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pygmydom|pygmydom]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-p-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pygmydom|pygmydom]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| dhapïfvïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || dhæpïfvïfth || dhæpïfvïfj || dhæpïfvïfsh || dhæpïfvïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || dhapïfpïfvïfth || dhapïfpïfvïfj || dhapïfpïfvïfsh || dhapïfpïfvïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || dhapïfvïfth || dhapïfvïfj || dhapïfvïfsh || dhapïfvïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || dhapïffvïffth || dhapïffvïffj || dhapïffvïffsh || dhapïffvïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || dhapïfvïfïf || dhapïfvïfïf || dhapïfvïfïf || dhapïfvïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || dhapïfvïfth || dhapïfvïfj || dhapïfvïfsh || dhapïfvïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || dhapïfvïfïfl || dhapïfvïfïfl || dhapïfvïfïfl || dhapïfvïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || dhapïfvïfïfïf || dhapïfvïfïfïf || dhapïfvïfïfïf || dhapïfvïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || dhapïfvïfïfn || dhapïfvïfïfn || dhapïfvïfïfn || dhapïfvïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || dhapïfvïfïforo || dhapïfvïfïforo || dhapïfvïfïforo || dhapïfvïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
